ModuleEnabled.Name: Enable Module
ModuleEnabled.Hint: Enable or disable the Your Flavor module globally.

AllowPlayerCustomization.Name: Allow Player Customization
AllowPlayerCustomization.Hint: Allow players to customize their own chat messages. When disabled, only the GM can customize chat.

ForcePlayerLayout.Name: Force Player Layout
ForcePlayerLayout.Hint: Force all players to use a specific chat layout. This overrides individual player settings.

AllowCustomHtml.Name: Allow Custom HTML (Players)
AllowCustomHtml.Hint: Allow players to use custom HTML templates. GMs always have this ability. Use with caution.

ApplyToWhispers.Name: Apply to Whispers
ApplyToWhispers.Hint: Apply flavor styling to whisper messages as well.

ApplyToAllMessages.Name: Apply to Rolls and Cards
ApplyToAllMessages.Hint: When enabled, Your Flavor also styles rolls, item/system cards, and complex chat messages. Disable if conflicts appear with other modules.

EnableFoundryCustomization.Name: Customize Foundry
EnableFoundryCustomization.Hint: Unlock the mad scientist lab for the Foundry UI. The GM can build a game-wide interface profile and decide whether that customization should also be pushed to players.

ShareFoundryCustomization.Name: Send Customize Foundry to Players
ShareFoundryCustomization.Hint: When enabled, the GM's Foundry customization becomes part of the game's interface and is also applied to players. When disabled, only the GM sees the customized UI.

UIScale.Name: Config Window Scale
UIScale.Hint: Scale the configuration window for better readability (80%-150%). Changes apply when opening the config window.

Configure.Name: Configure Your Flavor
Configure.Label: Open Configuration
Configure.Hint: Open the Your Flavor configuration panel to customize your chat style.

ResetFoundryCustomization.Name: Reset Foundry Customization
ResetFoundryCustomization.Label: Emergency Reset
ResetFoundryCustomization.Hint: Restore the shared game Foundry customization back to stock if your UI experiment escaped the lab.

Config.Title: Your Flavor
Config.Subtitle: Customize how your chat messages appear
Config.PreviewText: This is how your messages will appear in chat!
Config.AdvancedWarning: Custom HTML can break chat rendering. Use with caution.
Config.TestMessage: This is a test message from Your Flavor! Looking awesome!
Config.NoPermission: The GM has disabled chat customization for players.
Config.ForcedLayout: The GM has set your layout to:

Foundry.Warning: Danger zone: you can absolutely make Foundry gorgeous here, and you can also accidentally turn the UI into modern art. If things get weird, hit reset or disable Customize Foundry.
Foundry.Enable: Enable Foundry customization for this game
Foundry.ArrangeHelp: Use Arrange Mode to drag supported UI pieces directly on the tabletop. Width and scale sliders stay live while you tweak.
Foundry.PauseSpecs: Use a transparent PNG, WEBM, or MP4. Recommended max size: 900px wide and under 10MB for smooth loading.
Foundry.PauseLabelPlaceholder: Leave blank to use Foundry's default
Foundry.LivePreviewNote: Changes apply to your Foundry UI immediately while this window is open.
Foundry.DisabledState: Customize Foundry is currently off for this game
Foundry.CategoriesHint: Toggle which aspects of the Foundry UI you want to customize. Disabled modules won't apply any changes.
Foundry.ComponentsHint: Customize the look of individual UI panels — opacity, backgrounds, borders.
Foundry.ComponentBgHint: PNG or WEBP, 512×512 or larger. Seamless/tileable textures work best.
Foundry.CustomCSSWarning: Raw CSS injected here applies on top of everything else. Use with caution — bad CSS can break the UI. Hit Reset if things go wrong.
Foundry.CustomCSSPlaceholder:
/* Your custom CSS rules here */
#sidebar { backdrop-filter: blur(12px); }

Dialog.ResetContent: Are you sure you want to reset your flavor configuration to defaults? This cannot be undone.
Dialog.ResetFoundryContent: Restore this client back to stock Foundry? This will turn off the current Customize Foundry profile and remove this module's applied colors, layout, visibility, and pause media overrides.

Notifications.Imported: Configuration imported! Click Save to apply.
Notifications.ImportError: Failed to import configuration. Invalid file.
Notifications.FoundryReset: Foundry restored to stock on this client.
Notifications.FoundryResetDraft: Foundry draft reset. Save to keep it.
Notifications.FoundryImported: Foundry customization imported. Click Save to keep it.
Notifications.FoundryImportError: Failed to import Foundry customization. Invalid file.
Notifications.ArrangeModeEnabled: Arrange Mode enabled. Drag the highlighted UI pieces on the tabletop.
Notifications.ArrangeModeUnavailable: Enable Customize Foundry first, then turn on Foundry customization to arrange the UI.
Notifications.PresetApplied: Theme preset applied! Click Save to keep it.
